author: phase-4-coordinator
content:
Added fill_value field to MaskedArray (defaults to T::zero()). New API:
- with_fill_value(value) builder
- fill_value() getter
- set_fill_value(value) mutator
- filled_default() method that uses the stored fill_value (complements existing filled(fill_value) which takes an explicit override)

All operations now use the receiver's fill_value as the replacement for masked positions in result data, instead of hardcoded T::zero():
- masked_add/sub/mul/div and their _array variants (in arithmetic.rs)
- masked_unary_op/masked_binary_op helpers in ufunc_support.rs (which back all the trig/exp/log ufuncs)

The fill_value propagates through unary/binary ops via the result's set_fill_value call.

3 new tests covering default value, with_fill_value builder, filled_default behavior, and arithmetic propagation.

Closes #501.
